summary: V2 LiveEvent redesign testing complete. All 22 features verified - 100% pass rate. Multi-select athletes, horizontal cards, signal glow expand, batch save all working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test signals via batch save with TEST_v2_234 prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: V2 LiveEvent redesign testing complete (iteration 234). All 10 V2 design points verified: (1) Multi-select athletes (array instead of single) - PASS, (2) Horizontal card layout with photo/name/status - PASS, (3) Signal glow + inline expand showing consequence + suggested action - PASS, (4) Reduced vertical spacing ~15% - PASS (visual), (5) Updated note placeholder 'What did the coach say or do?' - PASS, (6) Multi-athlete batch signal creation (one API call per athlete) - PASS (verified 2 signals created). Key test IDs: athlete-card-{id}, multi-select-count, school-search-input, interest-{value}, signal-{value}, signal-intelligence, live-impact-panel, save-trigger-btn, notify-athlete-toggle, nav-toggle-btn, signal-cat-{key}. Batch save verified via API - 2 signals created for Emma and Olivia with same note text.
